title: SQL: key constraints not checked on UPDATE
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE a (id INTEGER NOT NULL, val INTEGER, unique_val INTEGER UNIQUE);
INSERT INTO a (id, val, unique_val) VALUES (1, 10, 100);
INSERT INTO a (id, val, unique_val) VALUES (2, 20, 200);
UPDATE a SET unique_val = 100 WHERE id = 2;
key_bug_features: Key constraints ignored during UPDATE operations
